script: const getAudioPath=async(e,a,l,i)=>{let o=require("path"),t=require("fs"),n=new Date().getTime()+".wav";return t.existsSync(o.join(l,"tts"))?(t.writeFileSync(o.join(l,"tts",n),await getTTSAudio(e,a,i)),console.log("folder already exists")):(t.mkdirSync(o.join(l,"tts")),t.writeFileSync(o.join(l,"tts",n),await getTTSAudio(e,a,i)),console.log("folder created successfully")),o.join(l,"tts",n)},getTTSAudio=async(e,a,l)=>{let i=l.apiKey||"",o=l.voiceName||"mimo_default",t="https://api.xiaomimimo.com/v1/chat/completions",n=require("axios");return new Promise((a,l)=>{n.post(t,{model:"mimo-v2.5-tts",messages:[{role:"assistant",content:e},],audio:{format:"mp3",voice:o}},{headers:{"api-key":i,"Content-Type":"application/json"}}).then(e=>{console.log(e);let l=e.data.choices[0].message.audio.data;a(Buffer.from(l,"base64"))}).catch(e=>{console.log(e),l("")})})},getTTSVoice=async e=>{let a=[{name:"mimo_default",displayName:"MiMo Default",gender:"female",locale:"zh-CN"},{name:"冰糖",displayName:"冰糖 (Bingtang) - Female",gender:"female",locale:"zh-CN"},{name:"茉莉",displayName:"茉莉 (Moli) - Female",gender:"female",locale:"zh-CN"},{name:"苏打",displayName:"苏打 (Suda) - Male",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN"},{name:"白桦",displayName:"白桦 (Baihua)- Male",gender:"male",locale:"zh-CN"},{name:"Mia",displayName:"Mia - Female",gender:"female",locale:"en-US"},{name:"Chloe",displayName:"Chloe - Female",gender:"female",locale:"en-US"},{name:"Milo",displayName:"Milo - Male",gender:"male",locale:"en-US"},{name:"Dean",displayName:"Dean - Male",gender:"male",locale:"en-US"},];return Promise.resolve(a.map(a=>({name:a.name,gender:a.gender,locale:a.locale,displayName:`MiMo TTS - ${a.displayName} (${a.locale})`,plugin:"mimo-tts-voice-plugin",config:{...e,voiceName:a.name}})))};global.getAudioPath=getAudioPath,global.getTTSVoice=getTTSVoice;
